steps.title: Fastest path: try the choices
steps.content: Because the choices give possible solutions, plug them into the equation instead of solving from scratch. The only choice that satisfies the equation is B, $324$.

steps.title: Undo the addition
steps.content: The equation is $k+12=336$. Subtract $12$ from both sides: $$k=336-12.$$

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: The value $324$ is correct because $336-12=324$. Adding $12$ instead of subtracting, multiplying by $12$, or dividing by $12$ uses the wrong inverse operation. B is correct.
